linapro-oidc-generic.description: Official source plugin that adds configurable enterprise OIDC sign-in to the login page. Depends on External Identity Core.
linapro-oidc-generic.name: Generic OIDC Login

callback.error: OIDC login failed. Please try again.
callback.unlinked: This OIDC account is not linked to any local user. Please contact the administrator.

settings.title: OIDC Settings
settings.description: Configure a standard OIDC identity provider (Keycloak, Okta, Azure AD, etc.). Copy the callback URL into the IdP client configuration.
settings.connectionKeyHelp: An internal name used to tell this login connection apart. It is fixed to default and usually does not need to change.
settings.displayNameHelp: The name shown on the login-page button so users can recognize it, for example “Company SSO”.
settings.issuerHelp: The address of your identity service. You can usually find it in the Keycloak, Okta, or similar admin console. It normally starts with https://.
settings.clientIdHelp: The client ID issued when you register LinaPro as an application in the identity service. Think of it as the app’s account name.
settings.clientSecretHelp: The secret paired with the client ID. Think of it as the app’s password. Keep it safe. Leave empty to keep the stored secret unchanged.
settings.clientSecretKeepPlaceholder: Leave unchanged to keep the stored secret
settings.redirectUrlHelp: After users finish signing in at the identity service, they return to this address on LinaPro. It is generated automatically—copy it into the identity service’s authorized redirect URI list.
settings.redirectUrlHint: Fixed by the plugin. Copy this URL into the IdP authorized redirect URIs.
settings.scopesHelp: Which user information to request from the identity service. Keeping openid email profile is enough unless your provider requires something special.
settings.defaultRedirectHelp: The page opened after a successful login into the workspace, for example /dashboard/analytics. Leave empty to use the system default home page. This is not the callback URL above.
settings.defaultRedirectHint: Default page after successful OIDC login. Leave empty for system default home. Does not change the Callback URL.
settings.autoProvisionHelp: When on: a first-time external login that is not linked to a local account creates a least-privilege platform user. When off: unlinked external accounts cannot sign in until an admin handles them.
settings.autoProvisionHint: Off by default. When enabled, a verified OIDC identity without a linked local account gets a least-privilege platform account. Same-email accounts are never silently taken over.
